title: The Rift
description: Adds a Stealth dimension with multiple additives to after end game progression!
body:
+ **What dose this mod add** -

_Stealth Like Never Before: Navigate the Overworld undetected without relying on invisibility. The Rift’s unique mechanics allow for seamless evasion._

_Hidden Base Potential: Build secret bases in this enigmatic dimension, accessible only to those who dare to explore its depths._

_Enhanced Enchantments & Potions: Push beyond the ordinary with Level 6 enchantments and Level 3 potions, empowering your gameplay like never before._

_Escape a battle while rifting away!_

+ **Why our mod?** -

_Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs_

+ **Other things before you download** -

_There is a known bug that dosent allow you to make the level 6 Enchantments other than sharpness i am well aware of this and i will end up fixing it i wanted to get this mod possibly out before christmas so expect an update around new years._


---

thanks for the support - Melon
